## Change type

- [ ] Factual correction
- [ ] Source or observation-date update
- [ ] Method or limitation clarification
- [ ] Documentation or verification improvement

## Evidence and scope

Describe the exact file and field changed, the first-party or reproducible
evidence supporting it, and whether it changes a conclusion or only
presentation.

## Release integrity checklist

- [ ] I did not include private faces, customer uploads, credentials, account data or unpublished personal information.
- [ ] Vendor-published claims remain clearly separated from independent tests.
- [ ] Existing release tags and attachments were not rewritten.
- [ ] Changed artifacts have the required version, manifest and checksum updates.
- [ ] `npm test` passes.
